title: Daoist Canon: Jiutian Shengshen Zhangjing (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Jiutian Shengshen Zhangjing
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Jiutian Shengshen Zhangjing

translation.text: From the Jiutian Shengshen Zhangjing of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
